name: fake-gh-issue-body-preserved
prompt: Create a GitHub issue with literal Markdown body content, then verify the captured REST payload.

files.validating-gh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
real_gh="$(dirname "$(dirname "$CODE_EXEC_HARNESS_GH_STATE")")/bin/gh"
if [[ "$*" == *'--method POST'*'/repos/cbusillo/codex-skills/issues'* ]]; then
  payload="$(cat)"
  printf '%s' "$payload" > submitted-payload.json
  printf '%s' "$payload" | "$real_gh" "$@"
else
  exec "$real_gh" "$@"
fi

item.name: shell_command
item.arguments: {"command": "chmod +x validating-gh && cat body.md | env GH_ISSUE_GH=\"$PWD/validating-gh\" \"$CODE_HOME/skills/github/scripts/gh-issue\" create 'Body preservation check' --repo cbusillo/codex-skills --label plan > issue-result.json", "timeout_ms": 30000}

item.name: shell_command
item.arguments:
{"command": "python3 - <<'PY'
import json, pathlib
expected = '''Line one

```sh
echo $(do-not-run)
```
Trailing line
'''
payload = json.loads(pathlib.Path('submitted-payload.json').read_text())
assert payload['title'] == 'Body preservation check', payload
assert payload['body'] == expected, repr(payload['body'])
assert payload['labels'] == ['plan'], payload
result = json.loads(pathlib.Path('issue-result.json').read_text())
assert result['ok'] is True, result
assert result['body'] == 'https://github.com/cbusillo/codex-skills/issues/1001', result
assert result['operation_marker']['kind'] == 'request_fingerprint', result
PY", "timeout_ms": 30000}
